title: Run trace (executor stream)
description: JSONL — one object per line. The executor appends one entry per observable step or assertion so the run is auditable after the fact and so generated.spec.ts can be derived from a known-working path. Validator runs line-by-line.

event.description: Event kind. Common values: run_start, run_end, navigate, click, fill, select_radio, type_text, press_key, upload_file, wait_for, evaluate_script, take_snapshot, screenshot, resize, reload, observe, measure, network_observe, network_response, scenario_start, scenario_pass, scenario_fail, scenario_not_run, assert, feature_flag_check, feature_flag_preflight, login_as, clear_localstorage, component_identity_verified, case_fitness_check, live_update_finding.

allOf.description: live_update_finding rows mirror the result.json field's shape so the executor can append them as it observes them and the reporter can pick them up either way.
